claims.description: One shared five-row test-only table drives deterministic matcher, retained adversarial/property matcher, closed deep-link, learner/person scope, and persisted-session composition boundaries with exact mapped routes and raw input.

The shared contract is exported by the test-utils package and contains catalog jump, freeform Mentor session, clarification, unsupported route, and wrong-scope denial without copying the existing generated corpus.
Disposable raw-input and route mutations fail every consuming boundary suite, are restored exactly without a mutation commit, and return the focused verification surface to green.
The implementation plan keeps Playwright, Maestro, flow-inventory, broad live-LLM, product behavior, backend wire, schema, migration, and supporter-surface work explicitly out of scope.
